issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2015 NISSAN JUKE. WHILE DRIVING AT 35 MPH, THE VEHICLE SHOOK, JERKED, AND STALLED WITHOUT WARNING. THE VEHICLE RESTARTED AFTER A COUPLE OF MINUTES AND WAS TAKEN BACK TO THE DEALER WHO WAS UNABLE TO DIAGNOSE THE FAILURE.  THE FAILURE RECURRED AND THE VEHICLE

ON 10/01/2015 MY 2015 NISSAN JUKE WAS AT NISSAN OF FIFE WASHINGTON WITH 50 MILES ON IT AND IT NEED A BATTERY AND ALSO A RECIRCULATION VALVE  TO BE REPLACED THE CAR WOULD NEVER BE THE SAME AGAIN PROBLEM AFTER PROBLEM THE TURBO WENT OUT AND THEY TOLD ME IT WAS BECAUSE I NEGLECTED T

WHILE DRIVING ON THE INTERSTATE, THE CAR SLOWS DOWN AND WILL NOT ACCELERATE.  IF I PRESS THE GAS TO GET OUT OF THE WAY OF ON COMING TRAFFIC THE CAR SKIPS AND DOES NOT GO OVER 40 MPH. I TRY TO GET TO THE FAR LANE IN HOPE'S OF NOT BEING HIT. I TURN THE CAR OFF AND TRY TO START IT A

MY BRAKES SUDDENLY WENT OUT WHILE PULLING INTO MY DRIVE WAY ON MY 3 YEAR OLD CAR. THERE WAS NO WARNING LIGHT, AND THE BREAK FLUID IS GOOD. I TRIED TO BLEED THEM ALSO. I RESEARCHED IT AND IN MARCH NISSAN PUT OUT A RECALL FOR 2015-2017 JUKE NISMO RS, A SPORTIER TRIM, FOR BRAKE PROB

JUST PULLED OUT FROM A STOP AT AN INTERSECTION, VEHICLE MADE A "CLUNK" SOUND AND THE ENGINE AND ALL ELECTRICAL QUIT. COASTED TO A STOP AND DID A WALK AROUND THE VEHICLE. WHEN REENTERING THE VEHICLE AND CLOSING THE DRIVERS DOOR ALL ELECTRICAL CAME BACK ON AND VEHICLE WAS ABLE TO B

narrative.headline: What 2015 Nissan Juke owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 34 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (38% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
